consumes: Generated from pipeline.yml; pipeline.yml is the active source of truth.
produces: Refresh with pipeline registry after structural changes.
remaining_TODOs: Generated/audit snapshot; do not treat as active workflow instructions.
Creates dataset-scoped GCT comparison CSVs consumed by MapThatProt; rerun intentionally because this refreshes core handoff state.
Builds dataset-scoped behavior/physiology metadata used by module activity scoring; does not change expression matrices.
Maps GCT-derived protein IDs to UniProt/gene symbols; enrichment and WGCNA consume these mapped files.
Legacy direct proteomics-behavior coupling retained as optional soma-only analysis.
Network/module/behavior coupling after networks and downstream module summaries.
Module-level behavior/physiology coupling context; missing behavior inputs become status rows.
Creates the dataset-scoped clusterProfiler manifest consumed by compareGO and program summaries.
Consumes only the manifest-selected clusterProfiler outputs for this dataset.
Runs after clusterProfiler and compareGO; summarizes conservative biological programs and uses annotations/signatures where supported.
Adds neuropil-reference annotation where supported; microglia uses this as context for ROI/local microenvironment interpretation, not subtraction.
Microglia-only targeted signature enrichment; supports conservative ROI annotation rather than purified-cell claims.
Builds a spatial program atlas from compareGO outputs without changing enrichment statistics.
Offline-only overlap against cached stress/disease signatures; missing optional signatures become status rows.
EWCE after differential/enrichment inputs are available; retained in enrichment because it is a cell-type interpretation layer.
Manifest after metadata and processed-data export.
PRIDE sample metadata.
Exports processed pg/mapped matrix package.
PRIDE supplementary tables.
Validation runs after export products exist.
Methods summary from registry/manifests.
Final biological claims table, including integration-stage manuscript summaries when available; refreshes the final evidence bundle after claims are rebuilt.
Manuscript figure export.
Manuscript source-data export.
Convenience export runner kept last; direct registry order above is preferred for dependency visibility.
Global synthesis; optional missing evidence is represented explicitly in status rows.
Manuscript-facing summary built from the integration atlas.
Ranks candidate manuscript programs and refreshes the final biological evidence bundle from existing downstream outputs.
Global recurrent GO/protein comparison used by curated overlap programs; does not alter WGCNA modules.
Curated overlap programs are global biological program sets and are distinct from WGCNA module construction.

Score/statistics/QC producer: computes module/supermodule scores, replicate QC, primary/sensitivity analyses, group statistics, directional effects, directional consistency, correlation structure, and behavior/physiology coupling tables. Does not rebuild WGCNA modules. WGCNA-source supermodule plots from this stage are legacy/QC (`legacy_supermodule_*`); final publication rendering is 06_modules_WGCNA/08_wgcna_score_publication_summary.R.
Bridge layer between WGCNA modules and DE/GSEA manifests; must run after WGCNA and enrichment.
Group-effect modelling layer for modules and supermodules; uses existing WGCNA state and is safe to run without recomputing WGCNA.

Biological annotation layer. Consumes marker registry, empirical markers, WGCNA outputs, and neuropil annotations when present; microglia labels refer to ROI/local microenvironment unless explicit immune-state evidence is present.
Final WGCNA interpretable module/supermodule summary layer. Runs after primary group effects and biological annotation, preserving broad plot labels alongside full annotation/rationale fields.

Final publication rendering for score-derived WGCNA supermodule plots. Consumes score/statistics outputs from 03 and cleaned labels from 06/07; validates labels, primary/sensitivity coverage, and unchanged score-derived statistics.
Protein-complex/organelle architecture evidence from existing module definitions; no core WGCNA recomputation.
Robustness/sensitivity synthesis from existing module effects, preservation, and QC/confounding outputs; no core WGCNA recomputation.
Network/module construction. This is the only stage entry that recomputes core WGCNA state; downstream annotation/reporting should use modules_downstream.
Generates spatial relation objects; may use module annotations when present but does not recompute WGCNA.
Differential networks after spatial relation generation.
Bootstrap network stability.
Bootstrap differential network stability.
Figure layer after bootstrap differential network stability.
Chord diagrams from mapped phenotype-within-unit edge/protein tables; current stage placement is retained although the input path is legacy-shaped.
Baseline dataset QC.
Quicksearch sample-level QC.
Missingness diagnostics.
Replicate consistency diagnostics.
Marker abundance QC; benefits from qc_global marker registries.
QC bridge into WGCNA marker interpretation; optional WGCNA state is used when present, so stage placement is QC although it can benefit from prior modules_wgcna outputs.

consumes: required: results/tables/03_qc_exploration/04c_marker_detectability_and_wgcna_bridge/{neuron_soma,neuron_neuropil,microglia}/marker_fidelity_by_sample.csv; optional: legacy marker detectability and protein provenance tables

Variance partitioning; no WGCNA recomputation.
